THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, ARMANDO THAN, HANG THANH $1,826.76 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,896.76, DEFENDANT, HANG TRANH TRAN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
